text: What are the basic elements of thoughts of TGKH M Zainuddin Abdul Madjid related to educational sciences that can become the basic elements of building pesantren as institutions of education? This paper examined philosophical underpinning of TGKH M Zainuddin Abdul Madjid’s thoughts towards educational sciences related to the educational institutions known as pesantren. In addition to explaining the philosophy of his idea of education, the study intends to verify and assess the relevance and feasibility of his ideas toward the National Education System in Indonesia. Using qualitative descriptive methodology and descriptive analysis method, the study found that the aim of TGKH M Zainuddin Abdul Madjid was not only to develop the spiritual and religion culture of the society of Lombok but in a broader sense aimed to establish a new world view in conjunction with a global civilization based on human values which can strengthen human life in this world and after death in the hereafter. The establishment of Pesantren Al - Munawwir as the icon of education was able to succeed in realizing that aims through the creative ideas and by his sincerity and also firm commitment in conducting educational work in which its underlying philosophy is intended to realize Islamic education at the science, moral and belief levels and to develop pesantren as the centre of learning and intellectual school in society.
